daily.today_energy: Your vibe is restless but electric today, Gemini. That scattered energy? Channel it into creative projects. You're meant to explore, connect, and question everything around you right now.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your chaotic charm today. If you're single, a random conversation could spark something unexpected. If coupled, your partner needs to see the real, unfiltered you—vulnerability is hot.
daily.career: Your ideas are flowing fast, and people are actually listening. This is your moment to pitch, propose, or plant seeds for something bigger. Trust that your instincts know what they're doing.
daily.health: Your nervous system might feel overstimulated—that's just your Gemini nature amplified. Ground yourself with movement, whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching. Your body craves expression today.

weekly.overview: Your week's got main character energy, Gemini. Mercury's supporting your vibe, so trust those instincts when something feels off. Creative breakthroughs are brewing—stay curious and let conversations flow naturally. Time to manifest something real.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your light this week, whether you're coupled up or single. If you're taken, deeper convos hit different rn. Single? That coffee chat or random DM might lead somewhere worth exploring. Keep your heart open but your standards higher.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing and people are listening. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Collaboration over solo moves will amplify your wins. Stay adaptable—the unexpected plot twist actually works in your favor this time.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for balance. Try grounding yourself midweek—whether that's grass touching, journaling, or a walk without your phone. Your body's wisdom is louder than usual rn, so tune in and honor what it needs.
